title: Author a Simple Private Contract with Zorzal | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
In this session, Zorzal (Team Lead at DeFi Wonderland) walks through building a simple private Aztec contract: a counter that lets whitelisted users privately increment a public value.

You’ll learn core concepts like notes, private and public execution, and note nullification, then write unit tests in Noir, run end-to-end tests in JavaScript, and deploy the contract to devnet.
